parsed_json.communicative_function: Confessing prior personal skepticism about Coué's lectures, typically to establish credibility or set up a contrast with later acceptance
implicit_claims: The speaker has direct exposure to or knowledge of Coué's lectures
The speaker's initial stance was one of total disbelief rather than neutrality or curiosity
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: Fully coherent; the statement is a straightforward, self-contained admission without internal contradiction
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: Context must include subsequent endorsement or conversion so the admission functions as a rhetorical bridge from doubt to conviction
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: Context of later acceptance is omitted, or the statement is attributed to Coué himself rather than a third-party narrator
